design_philosophy.mood: A modern, trustworthy educational resource. Not dusty/old, but respectful of tradition. Clean, structured data presentation mixed with warm, human imagery.

primary.description: Oxford Blue - Represents trust, intelligence, and authority.

secondary.description: Burnt Amber - Adds energy, warmth, and highlights key actions.

usage_rules.background: Use 'bg-stone-50' (#fafaf9) for the main page background to avoid sterile white.
usage_rules.cards: Use 'bg-white' with subtle borders ('border-stone-200') and soft shadows.
usage_rules.primary_action: Use Primary Blue for main buttons. Use Secondary Amber for 'Apply' or 'Urgent' actions.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure black (#000000). Use 'text-stone-900' for headings and 'text-stone-600' for body.

buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-stone-50 text-stone-900 shadow-sm

cards.school_card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-stone-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 flex flex-col overflow-hidden group
cards.stat_card: bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-stone-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col items-center text-center

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-md border-stone-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all bg-white

navigation.nav_bar: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-stone-200/60 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for floating elements/modals.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-lg for small elements, rounded-xl for cards, rounded-2xl for modals.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'lucide-react' icons. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use 'framer-motion' for subtle entrances. No chaotic movement. Smooth fade-ins and slide-ups.

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay for text readability.

students_study.usage: About section or 'Why Choose Grammar Schools' feature.

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all body text.
Interactive elements must have a min-target size of 44x44px.
Images must have descriptive alt text.
Form inputs must have associated labels.
Focus states must be clearly visible (ring-2 ring-primary).
Support keyboard navigation for all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text or buttons. Keep it flat and clean.
Avoid generic 'Education Blue' everywhere. Use the Stone/Earth tones to balance.
Use generous whitespace (p-8, p-12) to create a premium feel.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click. Links should have a subtle underline animation.
Data-testid: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.
No 'Lorem Ipsum' in final output if possible - use realistic placeholder data.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the Theme: Update 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css' first to match the color palette.
2. Build the Layout: Create a 'Layout' component with the sticky navbar and footer.
3. Create Components: Build 'SchoolCard', 'FilterSidebar', 'ComparisonTable' using shadcn primitives but customized.
4. Implement Pages: Start with Home, then Listing, then Detail.
5. Ensure Mobile Responsiveness: Test grid-cols-1 on mobile for all grids.
